note: Virtual paper portfolio, $1,000 inception. Data limitation: the SPY-proxy dataset ends 2025-12-19, so marks use the latest available close, not today's calendar date. T-bill yield accrues on the cash sleeve from champion v2 onward (applied at each mark).
champion: vol_target(target_vol=0.18, lookback=20) x SMA200/b3 gate, T-bill cash

history.note: Inception + initial allocation (session 1 omitted portfolio init; fixed this session).

trades.reason: Initial allocation per champion v2 target exposure 1.0000 (trend on, 20d vol below 18% target)
